segments: fund administration or finance operations teams with recurring evidence requests

problem: Small firms often perform compliance-related work but lack organized, current, easy-to-produce evidence when audits, diligence requests, or annual reviews occur.
promise: Organize and maintain compliance evidence so audits, diligence requests, and annual reviews are less disruptive.
included_services: evidence map by category, owner, source, and refresh cadence
document repository structure and naming standards
packaging evidence for specific requests or review events
status summaries for complete, stale, and open items

phase_1.name: Evidence Setup Sprint
outputs: first packaged evidence binder or request set

messaging.one_liner: We organize and maintain your compliance evidence so audits, diligence requests, and annual reviews stop becoming fire drills.
messaging.positioning: operational readiness and evidence hygiene, not legal or regulatory advice

why_entry_offer: easy to explain to warm contacts

guardrails: Use operational support language in all proposals
State that the client remains responsible for legal and regulatory determinations
Refer legal interpretation questions to counsel or qualified compliance leadership
Define deliverables concretely to prevent scope creep
